details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 60-min online session after 6 PM on Wednesday
Task 2: Buy highest-rated 3-session remote anxiety package under $300 (add to cart)
Task 3: Reserve 2 seats for weekend group ceremony within 30 days priced $40-$80
Task 4: Save up to three beginner-friendly shamanic journeying articles to reading list
Task 5: Select healer offering soul retrieval & cord cutting with trauma mention and send message
Task 6: Add sleep-focused guided meditation audio under $25, 4+ stars, 30+ minutes to cart
Task 7: Purchase a $120 e-gift card with custom message
Task 8: Create wishlist with 2 online sessions and 1 online package totaling $400-$500
Task 9: Subscribe to monthly newsletter with 'Dreamwork' and 'Spirit Animals' interests
